summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CrossCurrent Finance Center with all requested features. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% test pass rate. Frontend application works excellently with professional UI, complete navigation, and all core features operational including Trade Monitor with LOT calculator, Profile settings with timezone support, and Admin features.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with KPIs (Account Value: $250.00, Total Trades: 0, Performance Rate: 0.0%)
Profile page accessible via user menu
Timezone dropdown with GMT+8 options (Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan)
LOT size settings with live exit value calculation (LOT × 15 formula)
Trade Monitor with active signal display (MOIL10 BUY at 14:30 Asia/Manila)
LOT Calculator showing correct exit values (0.01 LOT = $0.15, 1.0 LOT = $15.00)
Profit Tracker with Add Deposit button and deposit history
Debt Management with Add Debt functionality
Admin Signals creation with timezone selection
Onboarding tour shows on first visit
Professional dark UI design with excellent UX

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All navigation, features, and UI elements working perfectly
